name: Release Notes 3.12.2 - API Updates
body:
Release Notes 3.12.2 - API Updates

Release Date: 8th July 2020

In this release we've added a new Special Orders indicator to the Inventory Planning API, and resolved an issue with the eCommerce API.

Inventory Planning

Added a new field to the GetPurchaseOrdersDetailed method to indicate whether a Purchase Order is linked to Special Order Items. The "HasLinkedSpecialOrders" field should not be confused with the legacy field "SpecialOrder", which always returns False for new orders.

Details:

  • Name - HasLinkedSpecialOrders
  • Type - Boolean
  • Description - Contains items for Special Order items
eCommerceResolved an issue with the OrderCreate method to return a Successful response when an order is created to a Fulfilment Outlet containing the "&" symbol.
